WHAT WE DO

Full-spectrum IT services for modern businesses.

From idea to deployment to scale — we cover every phase of your digital product lifecycle. We don't just write code — we architect systems designed to grow with your business.

ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS

How we solve your biggest challenges

☁️

Cloud Migration & DevOps

Seamlessly move your infrastructure to AWS, Azure, or GCP. We handle architecture redesign, containerization with Docker/Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and 24/7 monitoring — delivering 99.9% uptime.

AWSAzureKubernetesTerraformCI/CD
🤖

AI & Intelligent Automation

From GPT-powered chatbots to predictive analytics engines, we build AI solutions that automate workflows, extract insights from unstructured data, and supercharge decision-making.

LLMsComputer VisionNLPTensorFlowLangChain
🏗️

Custom Software Development

Full-cycle product engineering — from discovery and architecture to development, QA, and deployment. We build web platforms and internal tools that your team will love.

ReactNode.jsPythonGraphQLSaaS
📱

Mobile App Development

Deliver exceptional mobile experiences. We build highly scalable, native and cross-platform applications for iOS and Android that drive engagement and business growth.

iOSAndroidFlutterReact NativeSwift
📊

Data Engineering & Analytics

Design and deploy scalable data pipelines, real-time dashboards, and business intelligence platforms. Turn raw data into actionable intelligence with modern lakehouse architectures.

SnowflakeApache KafkadbtPower BISpark
🔒

Cybersecurity & Compliance

Protect your digital assets with end-to-end security audits, penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, and compliance frameworks (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA).

SOC 2GDPRZero TrustPen TestingIAM
⚙️

Enterprise Platforms (CRM / ERP / HRMS)

Custom-built business platforms that replace off-the-shelf bloat. Fully integrated CRM, ERP, and HRMS systems tailored to your workflows with real-time analytics.

CRMERPHRMSREST APIsMicroservices

FUTURE-READY TECH

AI Agents & Automation Workflows

🧠

Custom AI Agent Development

Intelligent agents designed for specific workflows using LangChain, OpenAI, and LlamaIndex. From code generation to specialized research bots.

LangChainOpenAILlamaIndexAgents
🎙️

AI Voice Agents

Conversational voice agents capable of handling inbound support, outbound sales, and scheduling with human-like natural language understanding.

VapiRetell AIVoice AutomationTTS
⚡

AI Workflow Automation

Complex, multi-step no-code/low-code automated workflows connecting your apps to AI. Save hours of manual work every week.

n8nZapierMakeAutomation
🕷️

Lead Generation & Scraping Bots

Automated agents that intelligently scrape the web, qualify leads, and populate your CRM without human intervention.

Data ExtractionWeb ScrapingCRM Sync

FULL SERVICE CATALOG

36+ services across every domain

💻

Programming & Development

Full-Stack Web Development

React, Next.js, Node.js, Django — end-to-end web platforms.

Mobile App Development

Native iOS/Android and cross-platform Flutter & React Native apps.

API Development & Integration

RESTful, GraphQL, and webhook integrations with third-party platforms.

E-Commerce Development

Shopify, WooCommerce, custom headless commerce with Stripe/Razorpay.

WordPress & CMS Development

Custom themes, plugins, headless WordPress, and CMS migrations.

Desktop Application Development

Electron, .NET, and native desktop apps for Windows, macOS, Linux.

🤖

AI & Data Services

AI Chatbot Development

GPT-powered chatbots, customer support agents, and conversational AI.

Machine Learning Models

Custom ML models for prediction, classification, and recommendation.

Generative AI Integration

LLM-powered content generation, code assistants, and image synthesis.

Data Analytics & Visualization

Power BI, Tableau, Metabase dashboards with real-time insights.

Data Engineering & ETL

Scalable data pipelines with Airflow, Spark, dbt, and Snowflake.

Computer Vision & NLP

Image recognition, OCR, sentiment analysis, and text extraction.

☁️

Cloud & DevOps

Cloud Migration (AWS / Azure / GCP)

Lift-and-shift, re-architecture, and hybrid cloud strategies.

DevOps & CI/CD Pipelines

GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD for automated deployments.

Container Orchestration

Docker, Kubernetes, Helm charts, and service mesh with Istio.

Infrastructure as Code

Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation for reproducible infrastructure.

Monitoring & Observability

Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, ELK stack for real-time monitoring.

Serverless Architecture

AWS Lambda, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge Functions.

🎨

Design & Creative

UI/UX Design

User research, wireframes, high-fidelity prototypes in Figma.

Brand Identity & Logo Design

Complete brand systems — logo, typography, color palette, guidelines.

Motion Graphics & Animation

Product demos, explainer videos, Lottie animations for web/mobile.

Presentation Design

Investor decks, pitch presentations, and corporate slide design.

Social Media Design

Post templates, carousels, story designs, and campaign visuals.

3D Modeling & Rendering

Product visualization, architectural renders, and 3D assets.

📈

Digital Marketing

SEO & Generative Engine Optimization

Technical SEO, content strategy, GEO for AI-powered search visibility.

Paid Advertising (Google / Meta)

PPC campaigns, retargeting, conversion optimization, ROAS tracking.

Social Media Marketing

Content calendars, community management, influencer partnerships.

Email & WhatsApp Marketing

Drip campaigns, segmentation, automation with Mailchimp / SendGrid.

Content Marketing & Copywriting

Blog strategy, SEO content, technical writing, and thought leadership.

Marketing Automation

HubSpot, Marketo, and custom marketing funnel automation.

🏢

Business & Enterprise

CRM Development & Implementation

Custom CRM platforms or Salesforce/HubSpot configuration and customization.

ERP Systems

Inventory, billing, procurement, and supply chain management systems.

HR & Workforce Management

HRMS, payroll, attendance, leave management, and performance tracking.

Project Management Tools

Custom Kanban boards, sprint trackers, and resource allocation systems.

Cybersecurity & Compliance

Penetration testing, SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA compliance, and zero-trust.

IT Consulting & Strategy

Tech stack audits, architecture reviews, and digital transformation roadmaps.

Our Commitment to You

🛡️

Quality Guarantee

Every project comes with rigorous QA, code reviews, and post-launch support to ensure production-grade quality.

⚡

On-Time Delivery

We commit to deadlines and deliver milestones on schedule with transparent sprint-based progress updates.

🔒

Data Security

Enterprise-grade security practices including encryption, access controls, and compliance with SOC 2 and GDPR.

🤝

Dedicated Support

A dedicated project manager and engineering lead assigned to your account from day one through post-launch.

Don't see what you need?

We build custom solutions for unique challenges. Tell us about your project and our solutions architects will scope a plan within 48 hours.
